mapper.select: SELECT uup.modl_cd ,uup.cug_id ,uup.req_svc ,( SELECT cd.CD_NM FROM AD_COMM_CD cd WHERE cd.COMM_GRP_CD = 'REQ_SVC_CD' AND cd.COMM_CD = uup.REQ_SVC ) cd_nm ,uup.stbl_plan_id ,uupm.plan_nm ,uupm.plan_expl ,uupm.stm_fir_reg_date ,uupm.stm_fir_reg_user_id ,uupm.stm_last_upd_date ,uupm.stm_last_upd_user_id -------------------- ,uapm.ref_plan_id FROM um_upd_plan_stbl_ver_map uup, um_upd_plan_mst uupm , ad_comm_cd cd -------------------- ,um_auth_plan_map uapm WHERE uup.stbl_plan_id = uupm.plan_id AND uup.req_svc = cd.comm_cd(+) AND cd.comm_grp_cd = 'REQ_SVC_CD' AND uup.modl_cd = #{modlCd} AND uup.cug_id in (#{cugId}, '0') -------------------- AND uupm.plan_id = uapm.auth_plan_id(+) ORDER BY cd.sort_odr ASC

-- 사용하지 않음
SELECT a.sw_nm, b.sw_file_nm, a.upd_scop_cd, d.cd_nm, b.sw_file_ver, b.stb_ui_ver, c.stb_sw_ver FROM um_sw_mst a, um_sw_file_dtl b, ad_comm_cd d, (SELECT sw_file_id ,stb_sw_ver ,root_plan_id FROM (SELECT uupsm.sw_file_id as sw_file_id ,uupsm.stb_sw_ver as stb_sw_ver ,uupsm.root_plan_id as root_plan_id ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY UUPSM.SW_ID ORDER BY UUPSM.STB_SW_VER DESC) AS ROW_IDX FROM um_upd_plan_sw_map uupsm WHERE 1=1 AND root_plan_id = #{planId}) WHERE ROW_IDX = 1) C WHERE a.sw_id = b.sw_id AND b.sw_file_id = c.sw_file_id AND a.upd_scop_cd = d.comm_cd(+) AND d.comm_grp_cd = 'UPD_SCOP_CD'

SELECT uup.modl_cd ,uup.cug_id ,uup.req_svc ,uup.stbl_plan_id ,uupm.plan_nm ,uupm.plan_expl ,uupm.stm_fir_reg_date ,uupm.stm_fir_reg_user_id ,uupm.stm_last_upd_date ,uupm.stm_last_upd_user_id -------------------- ,uapm.ref_plan_id FROM um_upd_plan_stbl_ver_map uup, um_upd_plan_mst uupm -------------------- ,um_auth_plan_map uapm WHERE uup.stbl_plan_id = uupm.plan_id AND uup.modl_cd = #{modlCd} AND uup.cug_id = #{cugId} AND uup.req_svc = #{reqSvc} -------------------- AND uupm.plan_id = uapm.auth_plan_id(+)

SELECT uursm.sw_id ,uursm.sw_file_id ,usm.sw_nm ,cd1.cd_nm as cdNm2 ,uursm.sw_file_ver as swVer ,usfd.stb_ui_ver as uiVer ,uursm.edge_refresh_yn ,uursm.etc --,SUBSTR(uursm.sw_upload_path_nm,0,INSTR(uursm.sw_upload_path_nm,'/',1,3)) AS sw_upload_path ,SUBSTR(uursm.sw_upload_path_nm,0,INSTR(uursm.sw_upload_path_nm,'/',-1)) AS sw_upload_path ,uursm.sw_upload_path_nm ,uursm.ver_upload_path ,uursm.sw_file_sz ,uursm.ver_file_sz ,uursm.stm_fir_reg_date
FROM um_urg_rcvr_sw_mst uursm ,um_sw_mst usm ,um_sw_file_dtl usfd ,ad_comm_cd cd1
WHERE 1=1 AND usfd.sw_file_id = uursm.sw_file_id AND usm.sw_id = uursm.sw_id AND cd1.comm_grp_cd = 'UPD_SCOP_CD' AND cd1.comm_cd = usm.upd_scop_cd
AND uursm.modl_cd = #{modlCd}
